items.label: Install
items.content:
# ZYNQ.peer

## Install

### Global Script Tag
```html
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/un-zynq/zynq-lib@1.0.8/index.min.js"></script>
```

This automatically makes **ZYNQ.peer** and **ZYNQ.games** available globally.

---

### ES Module Import
```js
<script type="module">
import ZYNQ from 'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/un-zynq/zynq-lib@1.0.8/index.min.js'
</script>
```

---

## Methods exposed
- peer
- games

These are available globally via `ZYNQ.peer` and `ZYNQ.games`.

items.content:
# ZYNQ.games

## Install

### Global Script Tag
```html
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/un-zynq/zynq-lib@1.0.8/index.min.js"></script>
```

This exposes `ZYNQ.games` globally.

---

### ES Module
```js
import ZYNQ from 'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/un-zynq/zynq-lib@1.0.8/index.min.js'
```

---

## Available API
- games
- peer

items.label: Basic Usage
Features
Filtering
items.content:
## Filter by category
```js
games.getByCategory('action');
```

## Supported devices only
```js
games.filterSupported();
```

## Favorites only
```js
games.filterFavorites();
```
